title: Thrust washer
abstract: This invention relates to a thrust washer (1) for internal combustion engines, provided with a metal base comprising a contact surface (2) associated with the engine block, and a slip surface (3), the slip surface (3) having a surface profile incorporating at least one ramp section (4), at least one flat horizontal section (5) and at least one oil channel (6), the ramp section (4) and the flat horizontal section (5) being connected by means of an asymptotic curve, the ramp section (4) tending asymptotically towards the flat horizontal section (5), eliminating points of inflection or vertices, giving rise to uniform hydrodynamic support, cancelling out transition effects, which results in a thrust washer (1) having a high resistance to wear and excellent performance.
claims: Claims 1 . Thrust washer (1 ) for internal combustion engines, provided with a metal base comprising a contact surface (2) associated with the engine block, and a slip surface (3), characterised in that the slip surface (3) comprises a surface profile incorporating at least one ramp section (4), at least one flat horizontal section (5) and at least one oil channel (6), the ramp section (4) and the flat horizontal section (5) being connected by means of an asymptotic curve, the ramp section (4) tending asymptotically towards the flat horizontal section (5). 2. Internal combustion engine characterised in that it comprises at least one thrust washer (1 ) as defined in Claim 1 .
